---
name: Tech debt

## Background

What debt exists?

## Impact

How does it affect development, testing, reliability, or operations?

## Proposed Direction

Smallest safe improvement path.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Behavior remains unchanged
- [ ] Tests cover the touched boundary
- [ ] Docs or ADRs are updated if needed

## AI Usage Record

Was AI used to inspect or plan the debt?
